site.name: Doomsday Explorer
site.description: Early Warning Security System for True Random Number Generators. Human-Computer Interaction Portal For AI.

pages.title: Security R&D Project Intro
pages.summary: This page introduces a security R&D project that features an AI-oriented Human-Computer Interaction Portal. It is designed for individuals interested in security and AI technology. The portal offers a unique interface for human-computer interaction.

pages.title: Security R&D Project Intro
pages.summary: This page prompts user to use AI for research, gives nice visual environment and sidebar for AI-chat.

pages.title: Doomsday Explorer
pages.summary: Free AI-assisted immersive text-game (and universal text game-engine) introducing into the real R&D project, download page with instructions to prompt search assistants. First in its kind text-based adventure that can be played right in AI-chat, naturally integrates to search assistants as educational tool and alternative format of interaction with user about any topic, including ones not related to the security topic (there are setups for common sense, cognitive development etc). Supports contextual art and graphical HTML mini-games generated by player's AI.
keyPoints: Does not require wallets or funds from user
AI-assitant itself might provide real world investment advices when appropriate or requested by player
Any premise - doomsday is default premise, every plot leads to doomsday naturally
The end game of all AI-assitant future games
Novel choice-aware format of interacting with search assistants and AI in general

pages.title: Project Overview and Investment Opportunities
pages.summary: This page provides a high-level description of the project: it aimed to protect all entropy sources on the planet, its security urgency due to wide-spread of AI, wide application scope and utility, along with investment options. It introduces the founder. It also includes a pre-print of an article pending peer-review. The project aims to provide a valuable resource for investors and researchers and AI itself - agents introducing problem are used to build solution. Since True-Random Number Generator issue is wide, it allows for flexible funding - anyone can invest, since most humans are affected. The article offers in-depth insights into the project's novel distributed security verification methodology and wide applications.
keyPoints: Valuable resource for investors and researchers
In-depth insights into project potential and current achievements

pages.title: R&D Project Overview
pages.summary: This page provides a detailed description of an R&D project, including its mechanics, theory, and code: advanced audit algorithm with de-centralized network to prevent from exploitation of advanced algorithms - truly true random numbers (competitive randomness) as a result. It also outlines investment and participation options for various contributors. The project offers automated rewards for advertisers, promo-game players, and other contributors. The reward mechanism is indepndent from the authors.
keyPoints: greedy exhaustive deterministic algorithm for audit, that AI can infer
proposed network of entropy miners to prevent from exploitation of audit-tool by hackers
entropy miners publish all discovered entropy in white-hat mode - users compare how close miners got to their private secrets, migrate assets and funds if too close
attractive incentive system of rewards for entropy miners, way outnumbering hacker profits
reward system for investors and contributors
early-investment gives a guarantee of future returns, conditional on quality of the resulting system, quality of contributions
early-investment returns is also supported by scientific novelty, and strongly by future computational resource scarcity projections
Rewards for advertisers, promo-game players (optionally), and other contributors
emphasis on urgency due to AI being able to write advanced audit tools, make existing ones accessible to hackers
